lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear and is in exceptional mechanical and cosmetic state. All components are in perfect working order.

Get ready to drive home in a masterpiece! This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, looking and feeling just like it did the day it rolled off the lot. Every detail is pristine, from the flawless exterior to the immaculate interior. If you're looking for a top-tier ride that has been meticulously cared for, this is the one for you!

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, presenting as though it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless with no scratches or dents, and the interior is pristine, showing absolutely no wear. Mechanically, the car is perfect; it has been meticulously maintained with all service records up to date. Every feature and electronic component works exactly as intended. This is a rare find for a buyer seeking a car in showroom condition with zero compromises.

The car is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic blemishes. The interior is clean and shows light wear from regular use. All mechanical systems are functioning correctly and have been regularly maintained.

This vehicle is being sold in as-is condition and requires significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The engine currently runs but exhibits a noticeable knock and multiple fluid leaks that need immediate repair. The transmission has become unreliable, occasionally slipping during gear changes. Externally, there is extensive rust on the wheel wells and rocker panels, along with several deep scratches and significant dents across the body panels. The interior shows heavy wear, including torn fabric seats and a non-functional air conditioning system. This car is best suited for a dedicated project or as a source for parts.

We are pleased to present this immaculate vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard that epitomizes the 'mint' designation. Every facet of this motorcar—from its flawless exterior finish to its pristine, showroom-quality interior—reflects a rigorous commitment to preservation. This is a definitive, investment-grade example, offering the discerning driver a level of refinement and mechanical integrity rarely encountered on the pre-owned market. We invite you to experience automotive excellence in its most preserved form.

Hey there! You've got to see this absolute beauty—it's honestly in perfect shape and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it still has that brand-new feel every time you get behind the wheel. No scratches, no dents, just pure perfection inside and out. I'm really sad to let it go, but I know the next owner is going to be absolutely thrilled with it. Come take a look and see for yourself!

Offering an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in impeccable condition. This specimen features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies, delivering linear power through a precise ZF 6-speed manual gearbox. The chassis has been fastidiously maintained with documented subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive VANOS system overhaul. Handling is sharp thanks to a factory-spec variable M differential lock and refreshed suspension bushings. The exterior retains its original luster with consistent paint meter readings, while the interior remains free of bolster wear or pixel degradation.
Mint condition. Original paint. Zero mechanical issues. Low miles. Clean title. Inspection ready.

Experience automotive perfection with this meticulously maintained, showroom-quality vehicle. This car has been strictly garage-kept and treated with the utmost care since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like shine with a professional-grade ceramic coating, free of any chips, dings, or imperfections. Inside, you’ll find a pristine cabin that still retains that new-car scent; the premium leather upholstery shows zero signs of wear, and every electronic feature functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the vehicle is in peak condition, backed by a comprehensive service history performed exclusively at certified dealerships. With exceptionally low mileage and a recent multi-point inspection confirming its top-tier status, this car offers a 'like-new' driving

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an uncompromising standard, its aesthetic and mechanical integrity are indistinguishable from new. From the flawless exterior finish to the pristine, smoke-free cabin, every detail reflects a history of meticulous care. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a truly superlative example of the marque.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, maintained to an exacting standard that reflects its original showroom state. This example features an impeccable exterior finish paired with a flawlessly preserved interior, representing a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar of peerless quality and mechanical integrity. Offered for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I’m parting with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total stunner. This car is in truly pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the lot for the first time! It drives like an absolute dream and has been pampered and garage-kept since day one. If you've been searching for that perfect, like-new ride without the brand-new price tag, you’ve found it. I'd love for it to go to someone who will appreciate it as much as I have, so come say hi and take a look!

Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Zero accidents. Clean title. Full service history included.

This exceptional vehicle is the definition of showroom quality, meticulously maintained and preserved in a climate-controlled garage. The exterior features original, deep-gloss paint with zero imperfections, protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine condition, with the premium leather seating showing no signs of wear and the original carpets protected by custom mats since day one. Mechanically, the car is flawless, benefiting from a documented history of preventative maintenance performed exclusively by certified technicians. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. The engine bay is clean enough to eat off of, and the undercarriage is free from any debris or corrosion. This sale includes all original documentation, two keys, and a full

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, preserved in pristine, showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and showing no signs of wear, this specimen represents the absolute pinnacle of its class. For the discerning buyer seeking an investment-grade asset, this vehicle offers an uncompromising standard of excellence and mechanical integrity.

Presenting a superlative example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is offered in impeccable, showroom condition. Meticulously preserved and rigorously inspected, it retains its original luster and mechanical integrity without compromise. This represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a specimen of unrivaled quality and provenance.

Hey friends! 🚗 I’m honestly so sad to see this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home! This car is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it still looks and feels brand new. I’ve babied it since day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for something that is totally flawless and ready for the road, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions or if you want to come take a look!

Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Full service history.

This is a true collector-grade vehicle, meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior finish is flawless, retaining its deep factory luster without a single stone chip or swirl mark. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the premium leather is supple and free of wear, and every electronic component operates exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, the car is perfect, backed by a comprehensive service history and low original miles. It drives tight, smooth, and powerful. If you are looking for a turn-key, investment-quality example that has never seen rain or snow, this is the one.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical pre-owned market. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and a meticulously preserved interior. Every mechanical component has been scrutinized to ensure peak performance, offering the discerning buyer a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled caliber.

We are proud to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in pristine, showroom condition. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior, reflects a legacy of uncompromising care. We invite discerning enthusiasts to inspect this peerless example of engineering and luxury.

Hey there! You have to see this absolute gem in person! It’s in truly pristine, showroom condition—honestly, I’ve babied this car since the day I got it. It looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot, and I’ve kept it garage-parked and sparkling clean. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the dealership price tag, this is the one for you. Can't wait for it to find a great new home!

Used car. Mint condition. Garage kept. No cosmetic or mechanical flaws. Full service history included.

This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, representing a rare find for the discerning collector or enthusiast. The exterior features original, factory-spec paint with a deep, mirror-like luster, free of any swirls, stone chips, or imperfections. It has been meticulously garage-kept and professionally detailed regularly. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery remains supple with no bolster wear, and the original carpets have been protected by heavy-duty mats since day one. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a complete and documented service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule at authorized dealerships. Every electronic component, from the high-resolution infotainment system to the climate control, functions flawlessly. This car has never seen inclement weather and drives with the tightness and precision of a brand-new vehicle. It comes with all original keys, owner’s manuals, and a clean title in hand.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard that warrants a pristine designation. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the preserved cabin environment, reflects a history of fastidious care and climate-controlled storage. This represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of investment-grade quality, free from the typical wear of its contemporaries. Performance is indistinguishable from new, ensuring an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast.
